title: Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions:
Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions!
